caption: A man wearing a white button-down shirt, suspenders, a bow tie, glasses, and a grey wig sits in a room decorated with framed pictures and clothing racks. He wears headphones and sits behind a professional microphone. In the bottom left corner of the frames, a logo reads "THE STALID PODCAST". In the background, a sign reads "GOSS TALK JOY" and another says "LEE". As the sequence progresses, the man looks down toward his lap, then shifts his gaze slightly while gesturing with his right hand. By the end of the clip, he looks toward the side and begins to speak, his mouth opening as he interacts with someone off-camera. The background remains static throughout the sequence, focusing the action on the man's subtle movements and facial expressions.
